problem id: 74339109
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01011110 -> 01100110
  11010010 -> 10010110
  00100000 -> 01111111
  10010100 -> 11101101
  10011011 -> 00100101
  11001011 -> 01100110
  10000111 -> 10010101
  10110101 -> 01111101
  10111010 -> 10110101
  11100101 -> 00111111

query: 10110011
predicted answer: 00000101
